series_metadata.series_title: Estimated Corp Franchise Tax Payment (FT-1120E, ER EX)
series_metadata.series_description: These forms are used by corporations for filing and paying a 1/3 of their estimated OH Franchise Tax. As well as paying their last 1/2 of estimated taxes and their second 1/3 payments.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: file scanned into ODT Info Image System ; Electronic: An electronic record is kept via ODT Info Image System
